description_long: This object is a classic assault rifle with a wooden fixed stock, wooden handguard, and pistol grip, paired with a black metal receiver and barrel assembly. The rifle features a curved detachable box magazine, typical of the AK-47 family, and a prominent front sight post with a rear notch sight. The barrel is long and slender, ending in a simple flash hider. The wood components have a polished, reddish-brown finish, contrasting with the matte black metal parts. The overall design is robust and utilitarian, with visible screws, pins, and mechanical details along the receiver and magazine well.
description: A robust assault rifle with a wooden stock and handguard, black metal receiver, and a curved magazine, resembling an AK-47.
description_view_0: The rifle is seen from the front, showing the barrel, front sight post, and the narrow profile of the wooden stock.
description_view_1: A full left-side view reveals the wooden stock, handguard, pistol grip, curved magazine, and the entire length of the barrel.
description_view_2: The rifle is viewed from above, highlighting the alignment of the barrel, receiver, and magazine, with the wooden components visible along the sides.
description_view_3: A full right-side view, similar to view 1, showing the opposite side of the wooden stock, handguard, and the magazine's curvature.
